heading: Supervisory actions applicable to undercapitalized regulated entities
label: 4615 Supervisory actions applicable to undercapitalized regulated entities

L. 110–289, § 1143(6)section 4611(e) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: closely monitor the condition of any undercapitalized regulated entity;

children.label: B
children.text: closely monitor compliance with the capital restoration plan, restrictions, and requirements imposed on an undercapitalized regulated entity under this section; and

children.label: C
children.text: periodically review the plan, restrictions, and requirements applicable to an undercapitalized regulated entity to determine whether the plan, restrictions, and requirements are achieving the purpose of this section.

children.heading: Capital restoration plan
children.label: 2 Capital restoration plan
children.text: A regulated entity that is classified as undercapitalized shall, within the time period provided in section 4622(b) and (d) of this title, submit to the Director a capital restoration plan that complies with and carry out the plan after approval.section 4622 of this title

children.heading: Restriction on capital distributions
children.label: 3 Restriction on capital distributions
children.text: A regulated entity that is classified as undercapitalized may not make any capital distribution that would result in the regulated entity being reclassified as significantly undercapitalized or critically undercapitalized.

children.label: A
children.text: the Director has accepted the capital restoration plan of the regulated entity;

children.label: B
children.text: any increase in total assets is consistent with the capital restoration plan; and

children.label: C
children.text: the ratio of tangible equity to assets of the regulated entity increases during the calendar quarter at a rate sufficient to enable the regulated entity to become adequately capitalized within a reasonable time.

children.heading: Prior approval of acquisitions and new activities
children.label: 5 Prior approval of acquisitions and new activities
A
children.text: the Director has accepted the capital restoration plan of the regulated entity, the regulated entity is implementing the plan, and the Director determines that the proposed action is consistent with and will further the achievement of the plan; or

children.label: B
children.text: the Director determines that the proposed action will further the purpose of this subchapter.

children.heading: Reclassification from undercapitalized to significantly undercapitalized
children.label: b Reclassification from undercapitalized to significantly undercapitalized

children.text: the regulated entity does not submit a capital restoration plan that is substantially in compliance with within the applicable period or the Director does not approve the capital restoration plan submitted by the regulated entity; orsection 4622 of this title
the Director determines that the regulated entity has failed to comply with the capital restoration plan and fulfill the schedule for the plan approved by the Director in any material respect.

children.heading: Other discretionary safeguards
children.label: c Other discretionary safeguards
children.text: The Director may take, with respect to an undercapitalized regulated entity, any of the actions authorized to be taken under with respect to a significantly undercapitalized regulated entity, if the Director determines that such actions are necessary to carry out the purpose of this subchapter.section 4616 of this title
